notes: Played for a couple of hours without any issue, after that the game would crash way too often at the end of the turn. I have tried yo disable D3d11 and using wined3d11, but to no avail.
title: Sid Meier's Civilization IV: Colonization

notes: Game runs normally, but not very stable. Around mid-game it starts crashing every few turns making the game unplayable.
title: Sid Meier's Civilization IV: Colonization

notes: I have used winetricks to install msxml3 which made the game much more stable. It crashes only when I use Go to Europe command further from high seas but that can be easily avoided by going to high seas tile manually and then using the button to leave the map.
title: Sid Meier's Civilization IV: Colonization
